collectionEdit.manualOrderingDescription: By default, series in a collection will be ordered by name. You can enable manual ordering to define your own order.

komf.autoIdentifyBody:
Launch auto identification job for entire library? This action might take a long time for big libraries
Continue?

libraryEdit.importComicInfoXml: Import metadata for CBR/CBZ containing a ComicInfo.xml file
libraryEdit.name: Name

readListEdit.manualOrderingDescription: By default, books in a read list are ordered manually. You can disable manual ordering to sort books by release date.

book.deleteBookBodyTemplate: The Book {bookTitle} will be removed from this server alongside with stored media files. This cannot be undone. Continue?
book.deleteDownloadedBookBodyTemplate: Book {bookTitle} will be removed from this device
book.deviceOnlyDeleteDownloadedBookBodyTempla: The Book {bookTitle} will be removed from this device only

library.deleteDownloadedLibraryBodyTemplate: The library {libraryName} will be removed from this device only.
library.deleteLibraryBodyTemplate: The library {libraryName} will be removed from this server. Your media files will not be affected. This cannot be undone. Continue?
library.analyzeBody: Analyzes all the media files in the library. The analysis captures information about the media. Depending on your library size, this may take a long time.
library.emptyTrashBody:
By default the media server doesn't remove information for media right away.
This helps if a drive is temporarily disconnected.
When you empty the trash for a library, all information about missing media is deleted.
library.refreshBody: Refreshes metadata for all the media files in the library. Depending on your library size, this may take a long time.

readList.deleteReadListBodyTemplate: Read list {readListName} will be removed from this server. Your media files will not be affected. This cannot be undone. Continue?

series.deleteDownloadedSeriesBodyTemplate: The series {seriesTitle} will be removed from this device
series.deleteSeriesBodyTemplate: The Series {seriesTitle} will be removed from this server alongside with stored media files. This cannot be undone. Continue?

bulk.deleteDownloadedBooksBodySingleTemplate: Book {title} will be removed from this device
bulk.deleteDownloadedSeriesBodyTemplate: {count} series will be removed from this device
bulk.deleteSeriesBodyTemplate: {count} series will be removed from this server alongside with stored media files. This cannot be undone. Continue?

bulk.removeFromReadListBody: Remove selected books from this read list?

settings.deleteAllServerDataConfirm: Yes, delete all downloaded files and user data
settings.deleteUserDataConfirm: Yes, delete user data and associated read progress
settings.deleteUserBodyTemplate: The user {email} will be deleted from this server. This cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.logOutBody: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.rootDescription: Special user that has access to all downloaded books
settings.rootReadProgressWillNotSync: Read progress will not be synced
settings.scanAllLibrariesDescription:
Check folders for new or removed books.
Uses the last modified time of parent folders
settings.deepScanAllLibrariesDescription: Force the scanner to compare all scanned books with the ones stored in the database
settings.shutDownServerBody: Are you sure you want to stop Komga?

settings.thumbnailRegenBody: Thumbnails size has changed. Do you want to regenerate book thumbnails?
settings.deleteEmptyReadLists: Delete empty read lists after scan
settings.imageCardSize: Image card size in grid view (minimum display size)
settings.epubReaderTtsuDescription:
Loads entire book data at once. May cause long load times or performance issues
Adapted for use in Komelia with storage/statistics features removed
settings.epubReaderKomgaDescription: Komga webui epub reader adapted for use in Komelia

imageSettings.loadThumbnailPreviewsWhileDragging: Load small previews when dragging navigation slider
imageSettings.loadThumbnailPreviewsWhileDraggingDescri: can be slow for high resolution images
imageSettings.updateOnnxRuntimeDescription: Update or download another version of ONNX Runtime
imageSettings.mangaJaNaiDescription:
MangaJaNai is a collection of upscaling models for manga.
The models are mainly optimized to upscale digital manga images of Japanese or English text with height ranging from around 1200px to 2048px.
imageSettings.onnxRuntimeExperimentalWarning:
ONNX Runtime support is experimental.
Might cause crashes or other app instabilities
imageSettings.panelDetectionDescription:
If model is available, a new "Panels" reader mode will be added.
In this mode reader will zoom and scroll from panel to panel
imageSettings.providerCuda: Cuda (Nvidia GPUs, requires CUDA12 and cuDNN9 system install)
imageSettings.providerDirectMlDescription: High-performance, hardware-accelerated DirectX 12 library for machine learning
imageSettings.providerRocm: ROCm (AMD GPUs, requires ROCm7 system install)
imageSettings.providerTensorRt: TensorRT (Nvidia GPUs, requires CUDA12, cuDNN9 and TensorRT system install)
imageSettings.providerTensorRtDescription: Uses TensorRT to create optimized graph engine. Takes a significant time on model first load. After initial load engine is cached for future use
imageSettings.providerWebGpuDescription: API for cross-platform efficient GPU access using system's underlying Vulkan, Metal, or Direct3D 12 technologies
imageSettings.restartRequiredForChanges: App restart is required for changes to take effect
imageSettings.tileSizeHelpText:
Splits image into small regions of specified size and upscales them individually
Upscaled regions are then recombined back into single upscaled image

This helps upscaling without running out of VRAM for big images

general.integrationDescription: Adds features aimed at metadata updates and editing
general.eventListenerDescription: Launch processing jobs when new series or book is added
general.enableMetadataJobsForLibraries: Enable metadata update jobs for libraries

apprise.usesAppriseDescription:
Uses Apprise executable installed on the system.
Templates are rendered using Apache Velocity

discord.usesMarkdownDescription: Uses markdown syntax. Templates are rendered using Apache Velocity

processing.libraryTypeDescription: Library type. Affects some options, mainly book name parsing
processing.orderBooksDescription: Attempt to order books using naming pattern based on selected library type
processing.aggregateDescription: aggregate and combine metadata from all enabled providers instead of taking first matched result
processing.mergeGenresDescription: if aggregate option is enabled merge genres instead of taking them from first matched result
processing.mergeTagsDescription: if aggregate option is enabled merge tags instead of taking them from first matched result
processing.overrideExistingCoversDescription:
If entry already has a user uploaded cover, mark newly uploaded cover as current.
If disabled, then upload cover without selecting it
processing.seriesTitleDescription: Update series title if matched metadata contains title data
processing.alternativeSeriesTitlesDescription: Update series alternative title if matched metadata contains alternative title data
processing.alternativeTitleFallbackDescription: Use first available alternative title if no main title with specified language is found

providers.useOriginalPublisherDescription: Prefer original publisher instead of localizing publisher

validation.collectionAlreadyExists: A collection with this name already exists
validation.presetAlreadyExists: Preset with that name already exists
validation.readListAlreadyExists: A read list with this name already exists
